task: Compare available plans for the AeroAPI on Flightaware.
final_result_response:
I now have all the information needed. Let me present a comprehensive comparison.

## AeroAPI Plans Comparison — FlightAware

Here's a detailed comparison of the three available AeroAPI tiers:

---

### 🔵 Personal
- **Monthly Minimum:** None (free up to $5/month in queries; $10/month for ADS-B feeders)
- **Rate Limit:** 10 result sets/minute
- **Historical Data:** ❌ Not included
- **Flight Alerting:** ❌ Not included
- **Foresight Predictions:** ❌ Not included
- **Aireon Space-Based ADS-B:** ❌ Not included
- **Static Maps & Imagery:** ✅ Included
- **Volume Discounting:** ❌ Not included
- **Uptime Guarantee:** ❌ Not included
- **Support:** ❌ None
- **Authorized Use:** Personal or academic purposes only (no commercial use)

---

### 🟡 Standard
- **Monthly Minimum:** **$100/month** (per-query usage fees apply)
- **Rate Limit:** 5 result sets/second
- **History Result Set Limit:** 500,000 result sets/month
- **Historical Data:** ✅ Included (back to Jan 1, 2011)
- **Flight Alerting:** ✅ Included
- **Foresight Predictions:** ❌ Not included
- **Aireon Space-Based ADS-B:** ❌ Not included
- **Static Maps & Imagery:** ✅ Included
- **Volume Discounting:** ✅ Included
- **Uptime Guarantee:** ❌ Not included
- **Support:** ✅ Email support
- **Authorized Use:** Business and Business-to-Consumer (B2C) purposes (no B2B commercialization)

---

### 🟠 Premium
- **Monthly Minimum:** **$1,000/month** (per-query usage fees apply)
- **Rate Limit:** 100 result sets/second
- **History Result Set Limit:** 500,000 result sets/month
- **Historical Data:** ✅ Included (back to Jan 1, 2011)
- **Flight Alerting:** ✅ Included
- **Foresight Predictions:** ✅ Included *(contact required to enable)*
- **Aireon Space-Based ADS-B:** ✅ Included *(contact required to enable)*
- **Static Maps & Imagery:** ✅ Included
- **Volume Discounting:** ✅ Included
- **Uptime Guarantee:** ✅ **99.5% SLA**
- **Support:** ✅ Email **and Phone** support
- **Authorized Use:** Business, B2C, and **Business-to-Business (B2B)** commercial purposes

---

### 📊 Quick Summary Table

| Feature | Personal | Standard | Premium |
|---|---|---|---|
| Monthly Minimum | None | $100 | $1,000 |
| Rate Limit | 10/min | 5/sec | 100/sec |
| Historical Data | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Flight Alerting | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Foresight Predictions | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Aireon Space ADS-B | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| B2B Commercialization | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Uptime SLA | ❌ | ❌ | 99.5% |
| Phone Support | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Email Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |

---

**Recommendation at a glance:**
- **Personal** → Best for hobbyists, students, or academic research with minimal data needs.
- **Standard** → Best for small-to-medium businesses needing historical data, alerting, and B2C applications.
- **Premium** → Best for enterprises requiring high-throughput, B2B usage, predictive data (Foresight), and space-based ADS-B coverage with an SLA guarantee.

Source: https://www.flightaware.com/commercial/aeroapi/

judge.reasoning:

**Output Assessment:** The agent produced a detailed, well-structured comparison of the three AeroAPI plans (Personal, Standard, Premium), including monthly minimums, rate limits, feature availability, authorized use cases, support options, and uptime guarantees. A summary table was also included.

**Evidence:** Step 7 (python extracting HTML from https://www.flightaware.com/commercial/aeroapi/) contains the full page text that directly matches every claim in the final response. All plan names, pricing details ($0, $100, $1,000 minimums), rate limits (10/min, 5/sec, 100/sec), feature flags (historical data, Foresight, Aireon ADS-B, alerting, maps), support levels, and the 99.5% SLA are confirmed in the extracted DOM content. The execution integrity is "healthy" with no errors.

**Summary:** The agent navigated directly to the AeroAPI pricing page, extracted the full content, and produced an accurate, comprehensive comparison that matches the source data in every verifiable detail.
